highlights.headline: Milwaukee Brewers vs. Pittsburgh Pirates: Game Highlight

tracking.trackingName: COM_MLB Highlight (Milwaukee Brewers vs. Pittsburgh Pirates: Game Highlight) 2026/07/11 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Rookie phenom Esmerlyn Valdez hit two home runs, including a go-ahead grand slam in the seventh inning, and drove in six runs to rally the Pittsburgh Pirates to a 7-6 victory over the Milwaukee Brewers on Saturday in the first game of a doubleheader.
headlines.shortLinkText: Esmerlyn Valdez's grand slam, two homers lead Pirates past Brewers 7-6 in first game of doubleheader
